A Manhattan manhole explosion left a woman and her two children with facial burns, while Hoboken's PATH service resumed after a track fire; additionally, a man sparked a bomb scare in NYC by leaving a U-Haul, and a killer received a 25-year sentence for gunning down a young mother.

### Risks & Alerts

- Woman and two children suffer facial burns from a manhole explosion in Manhattan. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPU2duUnBScXA5T2JDYUpPT3dpdlduU1NsUUN2SlhQWVZyTW9ERUFHLXZDS3RWaE5wZWczZUVqMnJlUU1WVnVVRzVyYmhGSTlNcFNidmo2NDVNeU5BMENTUXFEWTExbXBORXlIbXhFSEFTZVFZaFhlQ1I5cm5XWFBVWDZkeGItajlmUzVWLUE4cmU2elNGc0hvUWh6M2dJbTNhYkY3cw?oc=5)
- Hoboken PATH service has resumed after a track fire caused delays. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- One person hospitalized following a crash on the Staten Island Expressway. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Man arrested for allegedly setting fires in his home to kill spiders, causing a bomb scare. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- NYC Council speaker addresses property taxes and budget concerns at Staten Island museum gathering. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Delinquent owners shamed in council for creating snowy obstacles for the disabled. - NY woman who duped investors and funneled money to Trump fundraiser gets 9 years in prison. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
